case_title: JACKSON GROUP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VS. RAQUEL VEGAS et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON GROUP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT HEARING SET FOR APR-22-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 501

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-08-2013 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RAQUEL VEGAS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. Appearances:
Plaintiff Jackson Group Property Management is present. Represented by Nick Scarabosio.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Raquel Vegas is present.
Attorney Elizabeth Strode representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lamber litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of April 22, 2013 remains on calendar.(501/JPT)
